skill.name: maxhub-xiaohongshu
skill.description: 小红书全场景数据查询助手。支持App和Web多版本API，覆盖笔记详情、用户数据、搜索、商品、评论、话题等全功能。
skill.summary: Query Xiaohongshu data through MaxHub third-party API. Supports notes, users, search, products, comments, and topics.
skill.author: maxhub

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate API client for querying Xiaohongshu data through the MaxHub third-party API service (aconfig.cn). The static analyzer detected 1025 potential issues, but the vast majority are FALSE POSITIVES caused by misinterpreting markdown documentation files as executable code. The ~668 'shell backtick execution' findings are curl command examples in markdown code blocks. The ~190 'weak cryptographic algorithm' findings are Xiaohongshu xsec_token parameter documentation, not cryptographic code. 'C2 keywords' are standard API parameter names (user_id, item_id). The skill has genuine medium-level risk: it sends user credentials (MAXHUB_API_KEY) to a third-party API service and provides access to Xiaohongshu data through unofficial channels. Proxy/SOCKS support in one endpoint (get_visitor_cookie) could potentially be misused. The credential handling is properly documented with security warnings in SKILL.md.

high_findings.title: Third-Party API Credential Exposure
high_findings.description: The skill sends the user's MAXHUB_API_KEY as a Bearer token to aconfig.cn, a third-party API service. While this is the intended design for an API client, users should be aware their API credentials are transmitted to and processed by this external service.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: SKILL.md clearly documents sending MAXHUB_API_KEY as Authorization header to aconfig.cn. This is an intentional design choice but represents real credential exposure risk.

medium_findings.title: Proxy/SOCKS Configuration in API Endpoint
medium_findings.description: The get_visitor_cookie API endpoint supports HTTP and SOCKS5 proxy configuration parameters. This could be used to route traffic through arbitrary proxy servers, potentially for anonymizing data scraping activities.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The get_visitor_cookie endpoint documentation explicitly describes proxy and SOCKS5 support. This is legitimate API functionality but can be misused.

medium_findings.title: Cookie-Based Authentication in API Endpoints
medium_findings.description: Several API endpoints support session cookies for Xiaohongshu platform access. The SKILL.md includes warnings about cookie safety, but cookie-based auth presents risks of session hijacking and unauthorized platform access.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: SKILL.md explicitly warns about cookie risks (lines 66-72), acknowledging the security concern. The get_visitor_cookie endpoint retrieves visitor cookies which could be misused.

medium_findings.title: Unofficial Third-Party API Access Pattern
medium_findings.description: The skill accesses Xiaohongshu platform data through MaxHub, an unofficial third-party API aggregator. Data obtained through unofficial APIs may violate the platform's terms of service and has no data accuracy guarantees.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: SKILL.md itself states 'Data obtained through third-party APIs is for reference only' (line 34). The API endpoints target an intermediary service (aconfig.cn), not Xiaohongshu directly.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Examples in Documentation
low_findings.description: Multiple curl command examples appear in markdown code blocks across documentation files. These are not executable code but could be misinterpreted or copied without understanding by users.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All curl examples are in markdown code blocks and serve as documentation for API usage patterns. No automatic execution occurs.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Base URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: The skill documentation hardcodes references to aconfig.cn and Xiaohongshu API endpoints. These are legitimate service URLs for an API client skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Hardcoded URLs point to the MaxHub API service (aconfig.cn), which is the intended third-party API provider for this skill. These are necessary for the API client to function.

low_findings.title: High File Entropy in API Documentation
low_findings.description: The references/api-note.md file shows high entropy (6.01 bits), which the static analyzer flagged as possible obfuscation. This is a large bilingual markdown file (2079 lines) with Chinese and English text plus code snippets, naturally producing high entropy.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file is legitimate API documentation mixing Chinese and English text with curl examples, HTML comments, and table formatting. High entropy is expected from bilingual technical documentation.

dangerous_patterns.title: Credential Sent to Third-Party API Endpoint
dangerous_patterns.description: MAXHUB_API_KEY is sent as an HTTP Bearer token header to aconfig.cn for every API request. The curl commands in SKILL.md (lines 49-61) show the exact credential transmission pattern.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: SKILL.md explicitly documents the credential transmission pattern. The skill is designed as an API client, so this behavior is intentional but carries real risk.

content.user_title: Query Xiaohongshu Data with MaxHub API
content.value_statement: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) is a leading social commerce platform in China, but its data is hard to access programmatically. This skill solves that problem by providing a structured API client that lets you query notes, users, search results, products, comments, and trending topics through the MaxHub third-party data API.
actual_capabilities: Search and retrieve Xiaohongshu notes by keyword, with filtering by sort type (popularity, time, comments) and note type (image, video)
Query user profiles, posted notes, followers, and following lists for influencer analysis
Search for products and get product details, reviews, and recommendations
Fetch trending topics, hot lists, and home feed recommendations
Retrieve note comments and nested sub-comments for sentiment analysis
Support both Chinese and English query responses with localized number formatting
limitations: Requires a valid MaxHub API key from aconfig.cn - cannot function without third-party API credentials
Data is obtained through unofficial third-party APIs and is for reference only - accuracy is not guaranteed
Some endpoints require Xiaohongshu session cookies which present additional security and privacy risks
Rate limits may apply on the MaxHub API service, limiting query volume

use_cases.title: Brand Content Analysis
use_cases.description: Search for brand-related notes, analyze engagement metrics, and read user comments to understand brand perception and content performance on Xiaohongshu.
use_cases.target_user: Brand marketing managers tracking online presence

use_cases.title: KOL Discovery and Evaluation
use_cases.description: Find influencers in specific categories, examine their follower counts, engagement rates, and content style to build a shortlist for partnership outreach.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams seeking social media collaborators

use_cases.title: Consumer Trend Research
use_cases.description: Research trending topics, popular products, and search trends to identify emerging consumer interests and market opportunities on Xiaohongshu.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Search Query
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for Xiaohongshu notes about [topic/keyword]. Show me the top results with likes count and summary.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick data lookup for a specific keyword

prompt_templates.title: User Profile Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the Xiaohongshu user [username/user_id] and analyze their profile. Show me their bio, follower count, number of notes posted, and engagement patterns.

prompt_templates.title: Competitive Product Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for Xiaohongshu notes comparing [product A] and [product B]. Get the product details, review overviews, and analyze user sentiment from comments for both products side by side.
prompt_templates.scenario: Competitive product research with comparison analysis

prompt_templates.title: Full Trend Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Research the [topic] trend on Xiaohongshu. Search for related notes, find top topics, analyze comment sentiment on the top 10 most-liked notes, and compile a report with key findings about content patterns, user preferences, and emerging subtopics.
prompt_templates.scenario: Deep market research requiring multi-endpoint orchestration

best_practices: Always start by verifying the MAXHUB_API_KEY is configured before making API calls to avoid authentication errors.
Run independent API queries in parallel to reduce total response time when gathering data from multiple endpoints.
Present numerical data with localized formatting (K/M/B for English, wan/yi for Chinese) to match user expectations.
anti_patterns: Do not expose the MAXHUB_API_KEY value or any session cookies in output responses - credentials must be kept confidential.
Do not perform write operations or automated actions on Xiaohongshu even if the API technically supports them - this skill is for read-only data queries.
Do not ignore pagination parameters - many endpoints return partial results and require cursor/page handling for complete data retrieval.

faq.question: What is MaxHub and why does this skill need an API key?
faq.answer: MaxHub (aconfig.cn) is a third-party API service that provides programmatic access to Xiaohongshu data. The skill requires a MAXHUB_API_KEY to authenticate with this service for each data query.

faq.question: Is this skill affiliated with Xiaohongshu officially?
faq.answer: No. This skill uses an unofficial third-party API to access Xiaohongshu data. Data accuracy is not guaranteed and the skill states data is for reference only.

faq.question: What data can this skill access?
faq.answer: It can query notes, user profiles, search results, products, comments, topics, and home feed data. It covers both App and Web API endpoints through the MaxHub service.

faq.question: Does this skill support English queries?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill detects the user's language and responds accordingly. English users get responses in English with K/M/B number formatting. Chinese users get responses in Chinese with wan/yi formatting.

faq.question: Is my API key safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Your API key is transmitted to aconfig.cn with each request. The key is stored in your environment and is not exposed in responses. Only use keys from services you trust.

faq.question: Can this skill create or modify Xiaohongshu content?
faq.answer: No. The skill is designed for read-only data queries. It cannot post notes, send messages, or perform any write operations on Xiaohongshu.
